{{Quote|I'm known as Cudgel, far and wide.|Cudgel|<ref name="Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader">''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''</ref>}}
'''Cudgel''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as a translator and facilitator among the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and into the era of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Last time I was here, there was a guy named Cudgel...|[[Filli Bitters]]|<ref name="Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader" />}}
Many beings who first met Cudgel remarked that, despite the fact that he was Human, he was nearly as hairy as a Wookiee. When [[Olee Starstone]] traveled to Kashyyyk with Filli Bitters, it was Bitters who put her in touch with Cudgel. Cudgel's contacts included [[Tarfful/Legends|Tarfful]] and the leaders of [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]], who agreed to help the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] with their search. This effort was cut short when [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces descended on Kashyyyk, subduing entire cities in an effort to capture Wookiee slaves to work on the construction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. The group might not have escaped the attacks, but [[Roan Shryne]] suddenly arrived on the planet and confronted [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] himself. This allowed Starstone, the surviving Jedi, Cudgel, and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to escape aboard the ''[[Drunk Dancer]]''. However, after seeing [[Rwookrrorro/Legends|Rwookrrorro]] in flames, Cudgel and Chewbacca both asked to join the crew of the ''Drunk Dancer'', to ride out the trouble on Kashyyyk and plan an eventual return to the planet.
